# WhatSaid

> AI audio transcription with speaker labels, structured summaries, key actions, and custom Q&A. Upload .m4a, .mp3, or .wav and get instant results. Pay-as-you-go credits — no subscription.

WhatSaid converts audio recordings into useful text. Each credit processes one audio file and produces a full transcript with speaker labels, a structured summary with key actions, and answers to custom prompts. Audio files are deleted immediately after processing — only the generated text is retained.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, capabilities, and how it works.
- [Transcribe audio](/convert): Upload audio and start a transcription job.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Credit packs and per-credit value (£4.99 single, £14.99 5-pack, £39.99 20-pack).
- [Help & FAQ](/help): How-to guides, troubleshooting, and frequently asked questions.
- [Privacy policy](/privacy): How audio, transcripts, and personal data are handled.
- [Terms of service](/terms): Account use, credit purchases, and acceptable use.
- [Refund policy](/refund-policy): Refund rules for credit-pack purchases.
